Temperature in Kelvin is 122.9025 K
Λ_σ = 0.07328129053976805
Starting from N=0, skipping minimum distance check.

           Starting 1/t GC Wang Landau Simulation        
Be aware that Λ and thus implicitly the mass appears in the metropolis criterion

r_cut = 3.0000 σ
